# OrlaDent

> OrlaDent is a premium digital dental CAD/CAM design house ("Exactness, Earned") delivering precision crown, bridge, implant and full-arch design for dental labs and clinics — in hours, not days. Based in Egypt, serving clients worldwide, established 2025.

Key facts:
- Express single-crown design turnaround: 30–45 minutes
- 12+ case types supported; 5000+ cases handled; 100% quality-checked against published, case-type-specific SLAs
- Named-designer model: each client works with a real, named designer — no ticket queues
- First case designed free, no contract required
- Bilingual site: English and Arabic (RTL)

## Services
- [Crown Design](https://orladent.com/services.html#crown): single-unit crowns, inlays, onlays and veneers
- [Bridge Design](https://orladent.com/services.html#bridge): multi-unit fixed bridges
- [Implant Design](https://orladent.com/services.html#implant): implant crowns and custom abutments
- [Full Arch Design](https://orladent.com/services.html#fullarch): All-on-4/6/X frameworks, complete and partial dentures
- [Esthetic Design](https://orladent.com/services.html#esthetic): veneers and digital smile design (DSD)
- [Surgical Guides & Appliances](https://orladent.com/services.html#guides): CBCT-planned guides, night guards, splints, retainers
- [I-Bar Design](https://orladent.com/services.html#ibar): milled implant bar substructures

## Pages
- [Home](https://orladent.com/): overview, live 3D STL case viewer, client journey
- [Services](https://orladent.com/services.html): all seven disciplines with SLAs
- [Projects](https://orladent.com/projects.html): case portfolio by category
- [About](https://orladent.com/about.html): story, philosophy, the Three Laws
- [Contact](https://orladent.com/contact.html): upload STL / send a case — info@orladent.com
